title: Extraction and Detection of Free-Gossypol in Cottonseed Samples
author: Aparecido Almeida Conceição
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.krncv5e

steps.title: Dry the cottonseed sample at 40 °C for 24 hours
steps.instruction: Dry the cottonseed sample at 40 °C for 24 hours. 24:00:00, hours This protocol was tested with samples from cottonseed with linter, cottonseed without linter, cottonseed cake and cottonseed cake treated wuith basidiomycetes fungi. Undetermined The sample should be very well dried in order to proceed to the next step

steps.title: Grind the dry sample to form...
steps.instruction: Grind the dry sample to form a fine powder with an ultra centrifugal mill (0.5 mm) the samples can be grinded using bench mill if it is very well homogenized

steps.title: Weight 1 gram of the powdered...
steps.instruction: Weight 1 gram of the powdered sample into a 15mL plastic centrifuge tube with screw. undetermined

steps.title: Add 3 mL of ultrapure water into the tube
steps.instruction: Add 3 mL of ultrapure water into the tube. undetermined Use Mili-Q water

steps.title: Vortex vigorously for about 10 seconds
steps.instruction: Vortex vigorously for about 10 seconds. Make sure that the solution is very well homogenized. 00:00:10, seconds

steps.title: Ultra-sonicate for 5 minutes using ice in the sonicator
steps.instruction: Ultra-sonicate for 5 minutes using ice in the sonicator. 00:05:00, minutes The ice must fill the sonicator

steps.title: Add 7 mL of acetone onto the mixture
steps.instruction: Add 7 mL of acetone onto the mixture. undetermined Use grade HPLC reagent Acetone Contributed by users

steps.title: Ultra-sonicate for 5 minutes using ice in the sonicator
steps.instruction: Ultra-sonicate for 5 minutes using ice in the sonicator. The ice must fill the sonicator 00:05:00, minutes

steps.title: Vortex vigorously for about 10 seconds
steps.instruction: Vortex vigorously for about 10 seconds. 00:00:10, seconds Make sure that the solution is very well homogenized

steps.title: Centrifuge the tubes at 9000 rpm...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the tubes at 9000 rpm for 5 minutes at 8 °C. 00:05:00, minutes Undetermined

steps.title: Transfer 2 mL of the supernatant...
steps.instruction: Transfer 2 mL of the supernatant to 15 mL centrifuge tube. undetermined

steps.title: Evaporate the solvent in a speed vacuum at room temperature
steps.instruction: Evaporate the solvent in a speed vacuum at room temperature. All solvent must be evaporated The temperature should not be over 35ºC

steps.title: Resuspend the residue with 200 µL of 70% acetone
steps.instruction: Resuspend the residue with 200 µL of 70% acetone. undetermined 70% acetone Contributed by users Prepare 70% acetone using ultrapure water. The pellet remaining in the tube must be entirely suspended with the solvent.

steps.title: Transfer the solution to a 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the solution to a 1.5 mL Eppendorf tube. undetermined

steps.title: Centrifuge at 14000 rpm for 10 minutes at 8 °C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 14000 rpm for 10 minutes at 8 °C. 00:10:00, minutes Undetermined

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant to vial
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant to vial.

steps.title: Set a reversed phase C18 column (100 x 2
steps.instruction: Set a reversed phase C18 column (100 x 2.1 mm, 2.6 µm) in a UHPLC equipped with a photodiode array (PDA).

steps.title: Set column temperature to 35 °C
steps.instruction: Set column temperature to 35 °C. Undetermined

steps.title: Use methanol as organic solvent (A) and 0
steps.instruction: Use methanol as organic solvent (A) and 0.1% TFA in water as aqueous solvent (B) for mobile phase constituents. Methanol Contributed by users Water 0.1% TFA Contributed by users

steps.title: Set elution as gradient
steps.instruction: Set elution as gradient. The elution starts with 60% of A, changing linearly to 100% of A , it is reached at 8 minutes and maintained until 10 minutes. After this, the mobile phase suddenly changes to 60% of A, maintaining this isocratic flow till the end of run at 14 minutes. %s %s Time (min) %s %s Aqueous (%) %s %s Organic (%) %s %s Initial %s %s 40 %s %s 60 %s %s 8 %s %s 0 %s %s 100 %s %s 10 %s %s 0 %s %s 100 %s %s 10.01 %s %s 40 %s %s 60 %s %s 14 %s %s 40 %s %s 60 %s %s

steps.title: Set the sample manage to 8 °C
steps.instruction: Set the sample manage to 8 °C. Undetermined

steps.title: Set the PDA monitoring to 254 nm
steps.instruction: Set the PDA monitoring to 254 nm.

steps.title: Inject 2 µl of the sample
steps.instruction: Inject 2 µl of the sample. undetermined The gossypol peak should appear at 6.3 minutes using Empower software for analysis of chromatogram

steps.title: Set the flow rate to 0
steps.instruction: Set the flow rate to 0.4 mL/min.
